subcodes.first_line: O intimate friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! At every moment I cherish the desire to remember you and write letters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جانی عبدالبهاء هر دم آرزوی آن دارم که بیاد شما پردازم و نامه نگارم و زبان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
